name: Lincoln Home Loans
description_short: Nashville-based mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and specialty loan programs with 30+ years of experience.
description_long:
Lincoln Home Loans is a mortgage lending company based in Nashville, Tennessee, operating from their office at 40 Burton Hills Boulevard, Suite 200. The company has been serving mortgage borrowers for over 30 years and positions itself as a team of experienced mortgage brokers committed to providing high-quality home loans at competitive rates.

The company specializes in a comprehensive range of mortgage products including home purchase loans, refinance loans, home equity loans, cash-out refinances, jumbo loans, FHA loans, VA loans, and reverse mortgages. They serve multiple borrower profiles from first-time homebuyers to existing homeowners looking to refinance or consolidate debt. Their website includes educational resources such as a debt eliminator tool, calculators, and loan options guides.

Lincoln Home Loans distinguishes itself through customer service emphasis and quick processing timelines. Client testimonials highlight accessibility of loan officers (specifically named representatives like Roy Allen and Josh), professional handling of transactions, and competitive rate shopping. One customer reported closing in approximately 30 days from offer to close. The company provides multiple service channels including phone, email, and a web application process.

While the company presents strong customer satisfaction claims and legitimate mortgage offerings, potential borrowers should note that rates "change constantly" per their own website language, and no specific rate data is publicly disclosed. The company does not provide licensing information or regulatory status on their website, which is standard information many lenders prominently display. The testimonials, while positive, are limited in scope and sourced primarily from Google reviews.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 30 years of experience in mortgage lending industry
Wide range of loan programs including FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, and reverse mortgages
Customer testimonials report fast closing timelines (30 days from offer to close)
Multiple communication channels: phone, email, online application, and in-person consultation
Loan officers available for customer questions throughout process
Offers educational resources including debt eliminator tool and rate calculators
Serves multiple borrower profiles including first-time homebuyers and refinancing customers
cons: No specific current rates disclosed on website; customers must contact for quotes
Limited transparency on licensing, certifications, or regulatory status information
Small sample size of customer testimonials provided (all Google reviews, limited details)
No mention of loan processing times, approval rates, or closing cost transparency
Fax-only alternative contact method suggests potentially older business infrastructure
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking guidance through the mortgage process
Homeowners looking to refinance or consolidate debt through cash-out options
VA and FHA loan borrowers requiring specialized program expertise
Nashville-area residents preferring local in-person mortgage service
diagnosis: Lincoln Home Loans is best suited for Nashville-area borrowers seeking personalized mortgage service with an emphasis on customer accessibility and quick processing. Primary caveat is the lack of published rates and limited public transparency regarding licensing, regulations, and specific loan terms—all standard information needed for informed comparison shopping among mortgage lenders.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
